/usr/local/pspdev/bin/psp-gcc -I/usr/local/pspdev/psp/include -I/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/include -DPSP -L/usr/local/pspdev/lib -L/usr/local/pspdev/psp/lib -L/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib -Wl,-zmax-page-size=128 -specs=/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/prxspecs -Wl,-q,-T/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/linkfile.prx /usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/prxexports.o CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/main.c.obj -o ELYRIA_STORIES  -lpspdisplay -lpspgu -lpspgum -lpspge -lpspkernel -lpspctrl -lm
